samples.text:
Good Day Creatives,
Ben from SunnAx here. I am thrilled to announce my new partnership with Xencelabs. You know, the company that manufactures amazing artistic tablets for creative people?
I am an industry veteran and practicing artist who really understands the needs of people who desire to "level up" their innovation. These great tools can assist you and they are great fun to use!
Take a look at my new website; sunnax.net
For a limited time we are offering new customer discounts & free shipping on any order over US$2,000.00
Love to help you acquire the look & feel of artistic production!
Drop me a message and we can get you all set up!
Be colorful!
ben~

30-year creative technology veteran and practicing artist. Previously held senior business development roles at Unity Technologies, AMD, Foundry (now part of Amazon), Autodesk, Havok.com, and BioDigital. BFA in Computer Graphics from New York Institute of Technology. I match the right creative tools to the right artists — think of me as your creative technology sommelier. Now representing Xencelabs professional pen tablets through SunnAx Technologies. Based in New York City.

Is your processor intelligent? Every AMD Ryzen processor is armed with a true neural net to help analyze your computing needs and optimize responsiveness every millisecond. Improved performance and more advanced features, 2nd Gen AMD Ryzen desktop processors provide faster, smoother computing experiences than you thought possible.

Good Day Creatives,
Ben from SunnAx here — and I have some exciting news.
After 30 years in creative technology (AMD, Unity, Autodesk, Foundry), I have partnered with Xencelabs to bring their professional-grade pen tablets directly to artists and designers who are ready to level up their craft.
Why Xencelabs? I have tested every major tablet on the market. Xencelabs delivers the pressure sensitivity and build quality that serious creatives need — at a price point that does not punish your studio budget. These are tools built by people who understand what artists actually do with them.
Here is how to get started:
Visit sunnax.net and explore the full Xencelabs lineup.
New customers: use code COLORFUL for a discount plus free shipping on orders over $2,000.
I would love to walk you through which tablet fits your workflow best — that is what I do. Think of me as your creative technology sommelier.
Drop me a direct message or reply to this email. Let us find the right fit for you.
Be colorful!
ben~

Ben is the commensurate professional and mentor, as well as the best friend, and confidant a person could have. He always represents incredible technologies and shares invaluable information. It is an honor to have worked with him in the past and I cherish each and every moment we have shared. I truly hope that future opportunities continue to present themselves as he truly is a remarkably special and wonderful man. Rare breed. Top-notch.
